prices.source_block:
Exhibit Halls Admission
Visitors over the age of 3 require a ticket to enter the Museum Exhibit Halls. Members do not need to reserve tickets and can go straight to the Exhibit Halls entrance with their Membership card or confirmation email.
Adult $33
Child (3-11, children under 3 visit free) $28
Senior (60+) $29
Members (All Ages) $0

prices.source_phrase: The Museum is offering limited free or discounted admissions, which include Exhibit Halls passes issued by the Museum, MA WIC / EBT/ Healthcare Connector Card, US Active Duty Military, Library Passes, Wonderfund, Go City and Boston CityPASS (visit our Ways to Save page for more information).
prices.source_block:
Is the Museum accepting free / discounted admissions?
The Museum is offering limited free or discounted admissions, which include Exhibit Halls passes issued by the Museum, MA WIC / EBT/ Healthcare Connector Card, US Active Duty Military, Library Passes, Wonderfund, Go City and Boston CityPASS (visit our Ways to Save page for more information).

reservation.source_phrase: Timed tickets are no longer required – just select the date you will be visiting.
reservation.source_block:
Exhibit Halls Open Daily, 9 am ‑ 5 pm
To purchase tickets to the Museum Exhibit Halls, use the "Buy Tickets" button below. Timed tickets are no longer required – just select the date you will be visiting.

hours.source_phrase: Exhibit Halls Open daily, 9:00 am - 5:00 pm
hours.source_block:
Open 360+ days a year!
Museum Hours
Exhibit Halls
Open daily, 9:00 am - 5:00 pm
Planetarium and Mugar Omni Theaters
Sunday - Thursday open 9:00 am - 5:00 pm Friday and Saturday Nights, open until 10:00 pm (last show)
Regular Closures
The day before Thanksgiving - early close at 2:00 pm Thanksgiving Day - closed Christmas Eve - early close at 2:00 pm Christmas - closed
